overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from neon-lit commercial streets into a dark abandoned building. The footage features game engine graphics with prominent red neon lighting, wet concrete surfaces, and ends with encountering NPCs in a dimly lit industrial interior.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a neon-lit commercial street at night, passing red horizontal streetlights and tall buildings. A pedestrian with distinctive pink hair walks past on the left as the camera continues forward along the wet concrete sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open street into a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass supported by thick pillars. The scene transitions to an open plaza with bollards and distant palm trees, approaching a dark building entrance.

segments.scene_description: Entering the dark interior of an abandoned building from the plaza. The camera approaches a distinctive metal shutter door marked with a large white X, passing graffiti-covered concrete walls in the dimly lit entrance area.

segments.scene_description: Moving through narrow dark corridors deep inside the building, passing industrial shelving units and debris scattered on the concrete floor. The lighting is minimal, creating a shadowy atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a group of three NPCs standing near industrial shelving in a dimly lit room. After passing them, the camera continues toward a staircase at the back of the room, passing walls covered in graffiti.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district into the oppressive shadows of an abandoned industrial interior. It begins by moving along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath red horizontal streetlights and towering buildings, passing a pink-haired pedestrian. As the camera advances, the open street transitions into a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass before opening into a plaza with bollards and distant palm trees. The scene then shifts from the outdoor light into the dark entrance of a building, passing graffiti-covered walls and a metal shutter marked with a large white X. Finally, the camera pushes deep into narrow, shadowy corridors filled with debris and industrial shelving, passing a group of three NPCs before moving toward a staircase at the back of the room.
